briefs.title: BC Pharmacare Adds Plan NP, Removes Insulin Pricing Exception, Bans Extra Billing from March 1
briefs.summary: Effective March 1, 2026, BC introduces drug Plan NP for all medicare beneficiaries, removes the insulin exemption from price controls, and prohibits pharmacies from charging beneficiaries for fully covered drugs (except CF nutritional supplements).
briefs.action_required: Ensure your pharmacy billing systems and staff comply with the no-extra-charge rule and Plan NP enrolment by March 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Pharmacare Plan NP, insulin pricing rules, and extra-billing ban take effect
